base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_suitless_projectiles_shared — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1986 metroid. Projectiles reused from Power Suit (Beam/Wave/Ice/Missile/Bomb) — suitless and suited share projectile sprites. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Projectiles reused from Power Suit (Beam/Wave/Ice/Missile/Bomb) — suitless and suited share projectile sprites
